---
title: "Elizabeth Christian Dundas"
---

## Elizabeth Christian Dundas

**Dates:** (1841-1923)

### Description

niece of Anne Mackenzie

### Biography

She was living near Bedford with her sister Helen in the 1881 census.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 11th [1869 [[footnote:2]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
